Qin Yuan Chun · LaLaport Taichung

Qin Yuan Chun (LaLaport Taichung)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.5
📍 East District, Taichung📅 2026
Jiangzhe Cuisine Shanghainese Cuisine Bib Gourmand
Established back in 1949, Qin Yuan Chun is a Taichung icon that’s been serving up incredible Jiangzhe cuisine (classic dishes from Eastern China) for over seven decades, consistently earning a spot on the Michelin Bib Gourmand list. Their LaLaport location, perched on the 5th floor of the North Wing, brings those time-honored Shanghainese flavors into a bright, airy mall setting. The star of the show is the signature *Yan Du Xian*, a clay pot soup with salted pork and bamboo shoots that boasts a rich, milky broth. You’ll also love the silky crab roe tofu and the *Four-Happiness Kaofu*—a classic cold appetizer of braised wheat gluten that’s the perfect palate opener. Their freshly steamed *Xiaolongbao* (soup dumplings) are thin-skinned and incredibly juicy, and the pork chop fried rice is a must-try, featuring fluffy, distinct grains paired with a glistening, tender braised chop. For that essential "wok hei" (the smoky charred aroma from a high-heat wok), go for the beef with scallions, then balance it out with sweet and sour fish fillets and crisp stir-fried cabbage. Finishing with a bowl of warming scallion noodle soup makes for a feast that’s both indulgent and deeply satisfying. Perfect for family gatherings, big group dinners, and anyone craving a classic Shanghainese feast.
Good for Family gatherings Big group dinners

House specialties

Slow-Simmered Pork and Bamboo Shoot Soup in Clay Pot (Yan Du Xian) Steamed Pork Soup Dumplings (Xiao Long Bao) Braised Tofu with Crab Meat and Roe Traditional Braised Wheat Gluten with Mushrooms and Peanuts (Si Xi Kao Fu) Egg Fried Rice with Crispy Pork Chop

What I ordered

Clay Pot Cured Pork and Bamboo Shoot Soup (Yan Du Xian) Braised Tofu with Crab Roe Braised Wheat Gluten with Wood Ear and Mushrooms (Sixi Kaofu) Steamed Pork Soup Dumplings (Xiao Long Bao) Egg Fried Rice with Crispy Pork Chop Sautéed Beef with Scallions Sweet and Sour Fish Fillets Sautéed Cabbage Braised Noodles with Dried Shrimp and Scallions (Cong Kai Wei Mian)

Dishes

Restaurant info

HoursMondays to Fridays 11:00-14:30(L.O.13:50) / 17:00-21:00(L.O.20:30)
ReservationsReservations accepted (phone / online booking)
